repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3 says PartialID has no completed entry; pid_manski1990test is not a data-fusion compatibility proposal.

published_prior_art.cite: LannersRudinVolfovskyParikh2025 tests average interval overlap in expectation, but its published v/w intervals include treatment-propensity-weighted counterfactual components absent from this theorem.
No cited paper supplies this two-stratum cancellation calculation for the proposal's D_P functional.
LannersRudinVolfovskyParikh2025, §4/Remark 1: rho=gamma=0 imposes the baseline no-confounding and study-exchangeability restrictions; the stated equality reduction is their direct special case.

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3 has no completed PartialID inference entry.

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovLeeRosen2013 gives intersection-bound inference, MastenPoirier2020 gives breakdown-frontier bands, FangSantos2019 treats directional differentiability, and none supplies learned simultaneous data-fusion compatibility-set inference.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1 / comparator promise to LannersRudinVolfovskyParikh2025
novelty_flags.one_line: Lanners et al.'s published compatibility statistic averages the overlap of propensity-weighted v/w intervals, whereas D_P and L_t,U_t omit the observational treatment propensity and counterfactual-mixture terms, so the claimed strict tightening is not yet a comparison to their functional.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1 / project-level comparator claim
novelty_flags.one_line: The prose says the project replaces Lanners et al.'s signed diagnostic, but no statement establishes a strict relationship using that paper's actual v/w overlap functional; first adopt and name the published comparator exactly.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1 and target estimand K(P)
soundness_flags.one_line: C_P is not a functional of the stated observed-law model: observational treatment positivity is absent, so m_{t,0}(x) can be version-dependent, and even when defined a candidate q_{t,0} must satisfy its observed-treatment mixture constraint, which L_t,U_t omit; hence C_P=0 need not imply a compatible Q.

soundness_flags.label: ass:relative-nuc
soundness_flags.one_line: The cited Lanners et al. rho model compares the observed treated-arm outcome with the opposite-treatment counterfactual component in S=0, not q_{t,0}/m_{t,0}; retag this as a distinct novel model with justification or use the published propensity-weighted specification.

soundness_flags.label: ass:nuisance-product-rate and def:uniform-class
soundness_flags.one_line: The class is carved by an infimum over named candidate learners, and def:learner-class contains all functions so the infimum can select the true nuisances and is vacuous; state law-level estimability existentially and give actual learner-side rate conditions separately.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Rebuild the compatibility theorem from the published propensity-weighted v/w intervals, add observational treatment positivity and support/mixture constraints, and prove an explicit latent-law extension for every point in the revised zero set.

Replace the unrestricted learner infimum with named cross-fitted learner inputs, both-study propensity nuisances, uniform complexity/rate conditions, and a specified contiguous local alternative such as C_{P_n}=h/sqrt(n).
Anchor the comparator directly to Lanners et al. §4, Lemma 1, Remark 1, and Algorithm 3, then restate the cancellation proposition using its actual average-overlap statistic.

recommended_next_step: Continue revision: repair the observed-law feasibility model and exact Lanners comparator before advancing this angle to Stage 0.
